list.name: loki_selector
list.label: Loki stream selector
list.description: Loki stream label selector for the hort pods — edit to match your log-collection pipeline (promtail/alloy) labels.

panels.title: Upstream checksum mismatch (rate)
panels.description: hort_upstream_checksum_total{result=mismatch} — supply-chain integrity. Any non-zero is investigated.

panels.title: Storage integrity failures (rate)
panels.description: hort_storage_integrity_failures_total — streaming SHA-256 mismatch on get (CAS corruption).

panels.title: Ingest errors by result
panels.description: hort_ingest_total non-success results (success/duplicate/registered_by_hash excluded). Note: wheel_metadata_extract_failed is non-fatal by design — it co-emits with a successful wheel ingest (only the PEP 658 metadata advertisement is suppressed), so it is not a failed ingest.

panels.title: Auth failures by result
panels.description: hort_auth_attempts_total — invalid_token climb = credential-stuffing; idp_unavailable climb = IdP outage.

panels.title: Storage operation rate
panels.description: hort_storage_operations_total — put / get / exists / delete by result.

panels.title: Audit-event tamper attempts blocked
panels.description: hort_audit_events_blocked_total — UPDATE/DELETE/TRUNCATE blocked on append-only audit tables. Any non-zero is a tamper signal.

panels.title: Staging sweep overdue
panels.description: hort_staging_sweep_overdue — 1 = staging-sweep job overdue or never ran.

panels.title: Event-chain verify overdue
panels.description: hort_event_chain_verify_overdue — 1 = verify-event-chain run overdue or never ran.

panels.title: Unsafe config opt-ins active
panels.description: hort_unsafe_config_active — count of enabled unsafe opt-ins (pat_over_http, plaintext_webhooks, test_clock, ...). Page on any non-zero in prod.

panels.title: Cron rescan backlog
panels.description: hort_cron_rescan_eligible_artifacts — sustained > batch_size means the rescan loop can't keep up.

panels.title: Provenance rejects by reason
panels.description: hort_provenance_reject_total — unsigned / untrusted_identity / rekor_not_found / cert_chain_invalid / bundle_malformed.

panels.title: Lifecycle event rates
panels.description: State transitions/s: hort_quarantine_triggered_total, hort_quarantine_released_total, hort_scan_terminal_total{rejected|indeterminate}. (Event rates — Hort externalises live state COUNTS; see the note below for the exact-inventory option.)

panels.title: Policy decisions by result
panels.description: hort_policy_evaluation_total — pass / block / reject / require_approval / reset_to_quarantined / reset_to_released / ...

options.content: These three panels list the **latest released / rejected / quarantined artifacts** from the structured `tracing` log lines Hort emits per transition (each carries `artifact_id`). They require **(1)** `HORT_LOG_FORMAT=json`, **(2)** a **Loki** data source, and **(3)** a log shipper (promtail / Grafana Alloy) scraping the hort pods. Set the `$loki` data source and the `$loki_selector` stream selector (top of dashboard) to match your pipeline's labels. The authoritative record is the append-only event store (`ArtifactReleased` / `ArtifactRejected` / `ArtifactQuarantined`); these log panels are a convenience view.

panels.title: Latest released artifacts
panels.description: tracing lines "released expired artifact" (timer/scan) + "admin released quarantined artifact" (admin). Fields: artifact_id, authority, reason.

targets.expr: $loki_selector |~ "released expired artifact|admin released quarantined artifact" | json

panels.title: Latest rejected artifacts
panels.description: tracing line "scan-result evaluated" filtered to outcome="reject" (scan findings → ArtifactRejected). Fields: artifact_id, policy_id, violations_count.

panels.title: Latest quarantined artifacts
panels.description: tracing line "quarantine triggered on ingest" (+ "(default policy)" variant) emitted by the ingest path. Fields: artifact_id, policy_source.
